ops.title: cc-context native semantic search shipped in v0.30.0 (semble replacement)
ops.body: ccx code search/related now run a native in-process engine, replacing the external Python semble spawned via uvx. Pinned model: minishlab/potion-code-16M-v2 @ HF revision e9d2a44ca6a05ac6685f3b23709ea57eb7352d5b (model2vec-rs compiled to wasm32-unknown-unknown, resident wazero instance). Benchmark (semble's own 63-repo/1251-query harness, same machine): NDCG@10 0.8527 vs semble 0.8534 (the -0.0007 gap is 96% our deterministic batch-invariant embedding vs semble's pad-polluted batches, proven by a full chunk-injection partition; chunks neutral at -0.000025); query p50 1.384ms vs 1.778ms (beats); cold-index median 400.5ms vs 417.6ms (beats). Architecture: Go-native pipeline (walker, greedy tree-sitter chunker, hand-rolled BM25, RRF fusion, ranking stack, binary index cache with a resident in-process cache for warm serving); WASM only for model2vec inference (embed-core) + tree-sitter grammar parsing (19 languages, line-fallback otherwise). Full artifacts in .context/semsearch/ (gate-ccx-vs-semble, timing-ccx-full, injection-partition, baseline-semble-0.5.2). Supersedes the landscape research in note 85b7ab1 (bleve/hnsw/model2vec-rs options).
